title: Payments
metaTitle: Online Payments for Invoices · Get Paid Faster · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Add a pay-online link to every invoice and get paid by card. Paymob and global gateways, any currency, auto-reconciled to your books. Works worldwide.
keywords: online payments, accept card payments, pay invoice online, paymob, payment gateway, get paid faster, payment link
heroTitle: Let clients pay you in a tap
heroSubtitle: Put a secure pay-online link on every invoice so clients settle by card instantly. Payments reconcile to your books automatically, in any currency, anywhere.

features.title: Pay by card
features.desc: Clients pay any invoice online with a card, no login or app required.

features.title: Instant pay link
features.desc: Every invoice carries a secure link, shareable by email or WhatsApp.

features.title: Auto reconciliation
features.desc: Successful payments mark the invoice paid and post to your books.

features.title: Any currency
features.desc: Collect in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and more through the right gateway.

features.title: Secure & PCI
features.desc: Card data is handled by certified gateways, never stored by you.

features.title: Receipts sent
features.desc: Clients get an automatic receipt the moment a payment succeeds.

sections.title: Remove the friction between invoice and cash
sections.body: The faster a client can pay, the faster you get cash. A pay-online link on every invoice means no bank details to copy, no waiting for a transfer. The client taps, pays by card, and the invoice updates itself, with a receipt on the way.
items: Link shareable on WhatsApp and email

sections.title: The right gateway for your market
sections.body: Paper & Pen connects Paymob for the GCC and other global gateways so you can accept the cards your clients actually use, in their currency. Every settlement reconciles back to the right invoice and posts to your accounts, so collection and bookkeeping stay in lockstep.
items: Paymob for the GCC, plus global options

faqs.q: Is online payment free to enable?
faqs.a: Yes, adding pay-online links is built in. The payment gateway charges its own processing fee per transaction, as gateways always do.
Paymob for the GCC plus other global gateways, so you can accept the cards your clients use in their currency.

faqs.q: Does a payment update the invoice automatically?
faqs.a: Yes. A successful payment marks the invoice paid, sends a receipt and posts the entry to your books.

faqs.q: Can clients pay in different currencies?
faqs.a: Yes. Collect in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and more, routed through the appropriate gateway.
Yes. Card details are handled by PCI-certified gateways, never stored in Paper & Pen.

ctaSub: Start free and add a pay-online link to every invoice so clients can pay you in a tap.
